expectations.text: Total income is correctly calculated as $10,500.00 (5500 + 3200 + 1800)
Total expenses are correctly calculated (sum of all negative amounts)
Spending is broken down by category with at least 5 categories shown
Net cash flow / surplus is calculated (income minus expenses)
Uses pandas for the analysis rather than manual calculation
expectations.evidence: No pandas usage. Data read and summarized manually.
